entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: sailpointcontext-usage Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE List PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <List> <EntitlementGroup created="1714991777128" displayName="Albert Woods" id="c0a81d898f4c1ecb818f4d79c5680251" nativeIdentity="CN=Albert Woods,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"> <ApplicationRef> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.Application" id="ADX" name="ActiveDirectory"/> </ApplicationRef> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="memberOf"> <value> <List> <String>CN=AccountsPayable,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com</String> <String>CN=AccountsReceivable,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com</String> <String>CN=AuditMgmt,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com</String> </List> </value> </entry> </Map> </Attributes> </EntitlementGroup> </List>
